ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BlueBubblesApp/bluebubbles-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BlueBubblesApp/bluebubbles-app
Language: dart
A cross-platform app ecosystem, bringing iMessage to Android, PC (Windows, Linux, & even macOS), and Web!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DonutWare/Fladder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DonutWare/Fladder
Language: dart
Fladder - A cross-platform Jellyfin Frontend built on top of Flutter.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KRTirtho/spotube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KRTirtho/spotube
Language: dart
🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KaringX/karing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KaringX/karing
Language: dart
Simple & Powerful proxy utility, Support routing rules for clash/sing-box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Solido/awesome-flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Solido/awesome-flutter
Language: dart
An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ViscousPot/GitSync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ViscousPot/GitSync
Language: dart
Mobile Git client for syncing a repository between remote and a local directory

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cogwheel0/conduit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cogwheel0/conduit
Language: dart
Mobile (iOS/Android) client for OpenWebUI. Chat with your self‑hosted AI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dart-lang/sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dart-lang/sdk
Language: dart
The Dart SDK, including the VM, JS and Wasm compilers, analysis, core libraries, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flutter/packages
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/flutter/packages
Language: dart
A collection of useful packages maintained by the Flutter team

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fluttergems/fluttergems
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluttergems/fluttergems
Language: dart
The community contribution repo to add new packages & Flutter projects to Flutter Gems, a curated list of Dart & Flutter packages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: imaNNeo/fl_chart
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/imaNNeo/fl_chart
Language: dart
FL Chart is a highly customizable Flutter chart library that supports Line Chart, Bar Chart, Pie Chart, Scatter Chart, Radar Chart and Candlestick Chart.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: omnimind-ai/OpenOmniBot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/omnimind-ai/OpenOmniBot
Language: dart
Your on-phone / mobile AI Agent / Claw, capable of operating terminals and performing a wide range of tasks in the Android world || 你的手机 AI 代理，她可以操作终端，也可以完成 Android 世界的广泛任务

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sass/dart-sass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sass/dart-sass
Language: dart
The reference implementation of Sass, written in Dart.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sdegenaar/liquid_glass_widgets
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sdegenaar/liquid_glass_widgets
Language: dart
Flutter UI kit implementing Apple's iOS 26 Liquid Glass design language - a comprehensive glass widget library with real shader-based blur, physics-driven jelly animations, and dynamic lighting. Works on every platform out of the box.
